air-fryer-blackened-shrimp.name: Air Fryer Blackened Shrimp
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Place shrimp in a large bowl. Drizzle olive oil over the top and stir to coat. Sprinkle blackened seasoning over the top and stir to coat again.
Place shrimp in the basket of the air fryer. Cook for 5 minutes. Shake the basket and cook 4 minutes more.

air-fryer-cajun-shrimp.name: Air Fryer Cajun Shrimp
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Rinse shrimp under cold running water, dry with paper towels, and transfer to a large bowl. Add olive oil, garlic, Cajun seasoning, pepper, onion powder, and cayenne, and toss to completely coat. Place shrimp in a single layer in the air fryer basket.

Cook in the air fryer for 4 minutes. Flip the shrimp and cook until the shrimp are bright pink on the outside and the meat is opaque, about 2 more minutes. Depending on the size of your air fryer, you may have to cook the shrimp in 2 batches.
Remove shrimp from the air fryer and serve immediately garnished with parsley and lemon wedges.

air-fryer-curly-zucchini-fries.name: Air Fryer Curly Zucchini Fries

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Cut zucchini into two or three 3-inch pieces, then spiralize each piece.
Whip egg in a shallow bowl until foamy. Carefully pour melted butter into egg and whip until blended.
Combine flour, oregano, garlic powder, and pepper in a second shallow bowl. Stir together panko bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese in a third bowl.

Dredge zucchini spirals in seasoned flour mixture, shaking off excess flour. Dip spirals in egg wash, allowing excess wash to drip off, and then dredge spirals in Parmesan-bread crumbs. Place on a clean sheet pan.

Set air fryer temperature to 204°C (200 degrees C). Set timer for 12 minutes. Transfer breaded zucchini fries into the air fryer basket in batches without crowding. Cook until crispy, about 12 minutes. Serve immediately.

air-fryer-kidney-bean-popcorn.name: Air Fryer Kidney Bean 'popcorn
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 163°C (165 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions.
Spray kidney beans with olive oil cooking spray and toss with sea salt. Spread out in a single layer in the air fryer basket.
Air-fry until all of the kidney beans have split open and have become crisp, 25 to 30 minutes. Air-fry for 5 more minutes if they look under-toasted; they all should be varying degrees of brown.
Allow to cool and store in airtight container or sandwich bag.

air-fryer-roasted-chicken-juicy-inside-a.name: Air Fryer Roasted Chicken (juicy Inside And Crispy Skin)
air-fryer-roasted-chicken-juicy-inside-a.original_name: Pollo asado en freidora de aire (jugoso por dentro y con la piel crujiente)

ingredients.item: 1 cucharadita de hierbas provenzales o sazonador de pollo
Papel de hornear para freidora de aire

instructions: We clear up the chicken from an excess of fat and viscers and remove the potential feathers I could still have. Then we dry up our chicken with some paper. We put into half a lemon chicken.

With a spray or a sipstick of silicone, we embed chicken with olive oil well. In a bowl we mix all spices (salt, pepper, provenous or Italian herbs, pimenton and garlic powder) and embellish chicken well with spices throughout its surface.

We put the chicken with the breast down into the air fryer. Depending on the size of your air fryer, a bigger or bigger chicken will fit, in our case an 4,5l pint has been filled with an entire chicken about 1200 grams. We recommend that you place special oven paper for air fryers inside the bucket or basket of your air fryer if you wish to save your time and work while cleaning them.
We bake at 180 and 3 and for 30 minutes, with care and helping ourselves with some Silicone clamps we turn the chicken and bake another 30 minutes till the chicken's well golden.

air-fried-cauliflower-with-almonds-and-p.name: Air-fried Cauliflower With Almonds And Parmesan
instructions: {'level': 'Place cauliflower florets, 2 teaspoons oil, and garlic in a medium bowl; toss to coat.', 'step': '1'}
{'level': 'Place in a single layer in an air fryer basket.', 'step': '2'}
{'level': 'Cook in the air fryer at 180 degrees C', 'step': '3'}
{'level': 'for 10 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through.', 'step': '4'}
{'level': 'Return cauliflower to the bowl and toss with remaining 1 teaspoon oil.', 'step': '5'}
{'level': 'Add Parmesan cheese, almonds, bread crumbs, and thyme; toss to coat.', 'step': '6'}
{'level': 'Return cauliflower mixture to the air fryer basket and cook until mixture is crisp and browned, about 5 minutes more.', 'step': '7'}

air-fried-taco-dogs.name: Air-fried Taco Dogs
instructions: Cut 5 slits into each hot dog. Evenly rub 1/2 teaspoon taco seasoning over each hot dog.
Cook hot dogs in the air fryer basket for 5 minutes.
Place hot dogs in buns and return to the basket. Cook until buns are toasted and hot dogs are crisp, about 4 minutes more.
Top hot dogs with equal amounts of guacamole, salsa, and jalapenos.

airfryer-cinnamon-buns-recipe-comedera.name: Airfryer Cinnamon Buns Recipe
airfryer-cinnamon-buns-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de panecillos de canela en airfryer

ingredients.item: 500 gr de harina de trigo (todo uso)

instructions: Inicia la receta y toma la leche. Calienta por 1 minuto para que entibie en el microondas.
Disuelve en la leche tibia la levadura y deja reposar por 10 minutos.
A bowl adds butter and sugar. It's a good mix till they're integrated.
Incorpora la sal y los dos huevos, uno por uno. Mezcla hasta que queden bien unidos.
Procede a agregar de a poco la harina de trigo y ve mezclando hasta que vaya tomando consistencia.
Finally, pour the already hydrated yeast with milk and amase very well until you have a homogenous mixture.
Make the dough a ball, and get into a pitted bowl. Cover with a little cloth and let up for 1 hour or till it gets bigger.
In a small bowl, mix the sugar and cinnamon.
When the mass has increased its volume, put a plate and place it at the centre.
Fold again till smooth and with the help of a roller stretches and gives a rectangle shape.
Fold the dough with melted butter and then spread the cinnamon and brown sugar mixture.
Enrolla muy bien la masa y con un cuchillo filoso corta los roles.
Cover the air frying bowl with waxed paper or a mold and place roles. Let rest for 5 minutes and at that moment preheat the airfryer at 200 ° C.
It cooks the roles at the air fryer for about 35 minutes at 180 ° C or till they are well doraditos.
Deja reposar un rato, desmolda y disfruta.

akcaabat-meatballs-lezzet.name: Akçaabat Meatballs

ingredients.item: 100 grams of oily lamb cavity meat min
1 tablespoon of galeta flour or owl bread crumb

instructions: 1. Take a large coarse dana and lamb mint, & add the flour of chopped garlic, salt, pepper and galeta to the car.
2. Do not forget that the materials are thoroughly kneaded for 8–10 minutes; molpherine occurs as follows.
3. Harç from Olive size in parçs are rolling together with your hands or lightly press meatballs shape.
4. Heat the pan or grill in the middle fire, add mole and cook until each two sides of the gold color area (about 6–8 minutes each face).
5. Take the pişen into the service plate and wealth with the nail pide.

alentejo-soup-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo Soup
instructions: Cook the cod posts in water, drain them and let them drool. Remove their skin and spines, chip them and reserve. Pass the brother of the cooking through a network pusher and book as well.

Peel and finely pinch the garlic; grossly pinch the cilantros. Light a pot with the olive oil, let it warm, add the garlic teeth and let it shine. Then add the corianders, cod broth and chipped cod, season with salt and pepper and let cook for 10 minutes.
Cut the bread into thin slices and distribute them into deep dishes or bowls. Add the cod soup and serve immediately.

algarve-style-hake-teleculinaria.name: Algarve-style Hake
instructions: Tempere os filetes de pescada com sal, disponha-os num tabuleiro e deite por cima os alhos picados e a cebola cortada em rodelas.
Sprinkle with paprika, a hint of pepper and chopped parsley. Water with the lemon juice and abundant olive oil and oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 30 minutes. Serve with tasteful accompaniment.

almond-biscotti.name: Almond Biscotti
instructions: Stir 1 cup (200 g) sugar, ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, melted, 3 Tbsp. brandy, 2 tsp. pure almond extract, and 1 tsp. pure vanilla extract with a wooden spoon in a large bowl to combine. Add 1 cup whole almonds with skin, lightly toasted, cooled, and coarsely chopped, and 3 large eggs, lightly beaten, and stir vigorously to combine. Sift in 2¾ (344 g) cups all-purpose flour, 1½ tsp. baking powder, and ¼ tsp. kosher salt and stir until just combined and no floury streaks remain. Chill dough, covered, 30 minutes.
Place rack in center of oven; preheat oven to 177°C.

Using moistened hands, divide chilled dough in half and form 2 (16x2") loaves on an ungreased large baking sheet. Bake until pale golden, about 30 minutes. Carefully transfer loaves to a rack and cool 15 minutes.

Cut loaves into ¾" slices with a serrated knife. Arrange biscotti, with a cut side down, on a clean baking sheet and bake until golden, 20–25 minutes. Transfer to wire rack to cool completely.
Do ahead: Biscotti improve in flavor if made 1–2 days ahead. Keep in an airtight container at room temperature.

Editor's note: This recipe was first printed in the January 2009 issue of ‘Gourmet’ as Nonna’s Biscotti.

almond-contractors-argiro.name: Almond Contractors
instructions: Beat the whites with salt first in light meringue with a hand mixer or wire.
In bowls, add the almonds, sugar and almond drops.
Mix well with a spoon.
Add the beaten while with a spoon or spatula.
Take a seedful of the mixture and roll it into an almond fillet.
We give shape around or long.
Place them in sheet coated with parchment paper.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 160 degrees C in the air for about 15'-18', until golden.
Let them cool.

american-tuna-sandwich-very-creamy-comed.name: American Tuna Sandwich, Very Creamy
american-tuna-sandwich-very-creamy-comed.original_name: Sándwich de atún americano, muy cremoso

ingredients.item: Rebanas de pan  ((elige el de tu preferencia))

instructions: We're going to start our recipe by cutting into very small pines.
Now, get the onions or the onions and cut them into small portions.
Put into a bowl the preserved tuna that should be already run.
It should be added with onions and pickles. Later you will add his mayonnaise, his english salsa and his mustard.
Now, get some salt and pepper to taste. with a spoon or spatula you'll mix up and integrate everything completely.
Calienta una plancha o sanduchera.
You'll have a slice of bread and add a good portion of the pint. It should be spread until well distributed.
You'll put a slice of cheese and end up with the other slice of bread and plate.
You have to toast them till the bread's crispy and the cheese's broken.
That's right.

amish-peanut-butter.name: Amish Peanut Butter
instructions: Stir corn syrup, peanut butter, and marshmallow cream together in a bowl until thoroughly combined. Store in an air-tight container.

and-grilled-potatoes.name: And Grilled Potatoes

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.
Poke potatoes several times with a fork; place onto a microwave-safe plate. Microwave on high power for 5 minutes, turning potatoes over halfway through.
Slice each potato open lengthwise; microwave for 2 more minutes.
Brush oil on the cut sides, then season with salt and pepper.
Cook on the preheated grill until potatoes are tender on the inside and crispy on the outside, 15 to 20 minutes, turning halfway through.

antipasti-hand-salad.name: Antipasti Hand Salad
instructions: Cut 8 oz. cherry tomatoes into quarters. Transfer to a medium bowl, then pour 1 Tbsp. vinegar over. Let sit while you prep remaining ingredients.
Cut 2 oz. salami into small pieces about ¼" thick.
Grate 2 oz. cheese on the large holes of a box grater.
Pit ¼ cup olives, then cut into quarters.
Add salami, Parmesan, and olives to bowl with tomatoes.
Using a microplane, finely grate 1 garlic clove into same bowl.
Add 1 Tbsp. oil and 1 tsp. oregano and toss to combine.
Slice off bottom of 1 romaine heart and divide into leaves.
Serve hearts alongside salad, using each leaf as a boat for the salad.
Do Ahead: Tomato salad can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

aperol-kombucha-cocktail.name: Aperol-kombucha Cocktail

ingredients.prep: halved through stem ends, thinly sliced

instructions: Combine gin, Aperol, and kombucha in a large pitcher or glass jar and stir well.
To make each cocktail, fill a small glass with ice and pour in gin mixture to come up halfway.
Top off with club soda and finish with a few dashes of bitters and a tangerine slice or 2.

apple-cake.name: Apple Cake

ingredients.item: Nonstick vegetable oil spray or unsalted butter
Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Line bottom of pan with a parchment paper round and lightly coat bottom and sides of pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray or room-temperature unsalted butter. Toast ½ cup raw walnuts on a small rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop. Set aside.

Whisk 1 cup (200 g) granulated sugar and ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, in a medium bowl until smooth and creamy, about 2 minutes. Add 2 large eggs and whisk vigorously until fluffy, about 2 minutes. Add ½ cup sour cream and 2 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar and whisk to combine. Add 1 tsp. ground cinnamon, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. baking powder, and 1 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract and whisk again until incorporated. Add 2¼ cups (281 g) all-purpose flour and, using a large rubber spatula, fold in until no large dry streaks remain. Add 3 Honeycrisp or Fuji apples (about 1½ lb.), peeled, cored, cut into ½" pieces, and gently mix until each piece is coated in batter. Scrape batter into prepared pan and smooth surface with an offset spatula or a spoon.

Mix ½ cup (100 g) dark brown sugar, remaining 1 tsp. ground cinnamon, remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and reserved walnuts in a small bowl to combine. Sprinkle mixture evenly over cake.

Bake cake until top springs back when lightly pressed in the center or a tester inserted into the center comes out with only few moist crumbs attached, 45–55 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan before slicing.

apple-cookie-recipe-lezzet.name: Apple Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: You can use margarine or semi-semi butter and yogurt instead of butter.
Rawura can get a sweeter texture by adding some powder sugar.
Sweet or sour-eled apple hairou can capture different flavors using them.
Tar&ccedil can provide flavor richness by adding a small amount of ginger or muskat rendesi outside.
You can make your cookie more crunchy and tasty by adding nuts or almonds.
Dry berries such as dry grape or blueberry also add a nice touch.
After rolling the dough and wrapped in roll shape, you can give the cookie shape.
You can also prepare single portion apple tarts by cooking in mini weighing molds.
You can sued with a thin chocolate sauce or honey.
Besides serving, tar&ccedil increases flavor to offer creamy or vanilla ice cream.

instructions: 1. Peel the apples and mix with small cubes in the form and lemon juice.
2. Add to your car and add optional carnation and mix it into lightly.
3. From the infusion of butter and powder sugar cream in a large container, rub.
4. Add and mix eggs and vanilla.
5. Unu gradually knead a soft dough by adding.
6. Hamur &ccedil should not be hard, easy shape should be consistency.
7. The dough you have got to be divided into two equal parts.
8. Take a round shape with the help of each shimmer and 8 equal parts.
9. Wrap the dough by putting azar azar from the apple har&ccedil.
10. The apple cookie dough you prepared in the oil paper-series oven tray as well as index.
11. 11. 11. 11. Uyou can press the lightç to the car.
12. From 180°C to 20–25 minutes, gold color area.
12. August From the oven with powder sugar after cooling cookies.

apple-cherry-steel-cut-oats.name: Apple-cherry Steel-cut Oats
instructions: Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add almonds and cook, stirring often, until browned in spots, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a small plate.

Add apple, 1 Tbsp. maple syrup, cinnamon, and cardamom to pan and stir. Increase heat to medium-high and cook, stirring often, until apple begins to soften. Add cherries; stir to coat. Add oats and 3 cups water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring often and adding water by tablespoonfuls if too thick, until oats are tender, about 5 minutes. Divide among bowls. Drizzle with milk and warm maple syrup, if desired. Sprinkle almonds over.

apple-cranberry-tarte-tatin.name: Apple-cranberry Tarte Tatin

ingredients.item: . plus 1 0.75 cups all-purpose flour; plus more for surface
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Grate 1 cup (2 sticks) unsalted butter, frozen 15 minutes, on the large holes of a box grater into a medium bowl. Sprinkle 2 Tbsp. (16 g) all-purpose flour over and toss gently to coat. Freeze at least another 15 minutes.

Whisk ¼ cup (50 g) granulated sugar, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ¼ tsp. baking powder, and 1¾ cups (219 g) all-purpose flour in a large bowl. Add half of butter (eyeballing is okay); toss to coat. Add ½ cup whole milk; mix with a fork until a shaggy dough forms. It should hold together when squeezed in your palm. Add more milk 1 tsp. at a time if needed. Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface and knead until no dry pockets remain but dough still looks slightly shaggy; press into a ½"-thick disk. Wrap in plastic; chill at least 30 minutes and up to 12 hours. Cover grated butter and keep frozen until ready to roll out dough.

Unwrap dough and roll out on a lightly floured surface to create an 18x6" rectangle with a short end facing you. Sprinkle about a quarter of remaining butter in a single layer over center of dough to create a 6" square. Fold upper half of dough down over butter, lining up outside edges (you should have a 12x6" rectangle); press lightly to seal. Sprinkle a third of remaining butter over top half of dough, leaving bottom 6" uncovered. Fold lower third of dough up and over butter to form a 6x6" packet; press lightly to seal. Rotate dough 90° clockwise so top flap opens on your right. Roll out to an 18x6" rectangle, dusting with more flour as needed. Repeat entire folding process, dividing remaining butter evenly. Wrap reformed 6x6" dough packet in plastic; chill at least 30 minutes.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 425°. Cook 1 cup (200 g) granulated sugar and ¼ cup water in a 10"–11" stainless-steel skillet over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally and using a wet pastry brush to brush sides of pan if crystals start to form, until mixture turns deep amber and wisps of smoke begin to appear, 6–8 minutes. Add 4 Tbsp. (½ stick) unsalted butter, cut into small pieces, 1 Tbsp. vanilla extract, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice (be careful; caramel will sizzle) and stir just until butter is melted and caramel is smooth (some sugar may seize along the way, but it should all be melted by this point). Let cool until hardened, about 10 minutes.

Toss 2½ lb. Honeycrisp apples (about 5 large), peeled, cored, quartered, 3 Tbsp. cornstarch, and remaining 3 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice in a large bowl to coat. Scatter ¾ cup fresh or frozen cranberries over caramel. Arrange apples, cut sides up, on top, starting at edges of skillet and working toward the center to create a spiral pattern (fit in tightly; some overlap is okay). Scatter remaining ¾ cup fresh or frozen cranberries over, letting them fall between apples. (Depending on the size of your pan, you might not use all of the fruit.) Drizzle liquid left in bowl over.

Unwrap pastry and roll out on a lightly floured surface to a 12" round. Carefully drape over fruit; tuck edges inside pan. Cut four 1"-long slits in center of pastry. Bake until juices are bubbling around the edges and pastry is deep golden brown, 40–45 minutes. Let cool 30–60 minutes.
Set a cake stand or large plate upside down over skillet; holding together, quickly flip over to turn out tarte Tatin. Top with scoops of vanilla ice cream to serve.

applejack-sour.name: Applejack Sour
instructions: Combine applejack, lemon juice, orange juice, maple syrup, and bitters in a cocktail shaker. Add ice and shake until the outside of the shaker is frosty, about 20 seconds.
Strain cocktail into an ice-filled rocks glass and sprinkle with nutmeg.

apricot-sponge-cake-teleculinaria.name: Apricot Sponge Cake
instructions: Garnish with butter a round shape 22 cm in diameter and sprinkle it with flour. In a bowl, beat the butter softened with sugar. Add the flour mixed with yeast, then the eggs and stir well.
On the other hand, beat the clears into castle and wrap in the previous mass. Lay in the form, reserving about 1/4, and take it to the oven, preheated to 180°C, for 20 minutes.
Wash the apricots thoroughly, remove their pit and cut the pulp into cubes. Mix with the almond biscuits, roughly crushed, the dough you reserved and the liquid caramel.

After the specified oven time, lay the previous dough on the cake and sprinkle with the rolled almonds. Take it back to the oven for another 25 minutes. Check the cooking with a toothpick, remove, let cool, peel and serve.

arugula-and-roasted-pear-salad.name: Arugula And Roasted Pear Salad

ingredients.prep: almost-ripe pears (Bartlett or Bosc), peeled, cored, and cut lengthwise

instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 204°C.
2. In a medium bowl, toss the pears, sugar, and butter. Arrange the pears in a single layer in a baking sheet. Bake, turning once, until the pears are barely tender, 10—15 minutes.
3. Dry roast the pine nuts in a skillet for 5 minutes, until toasty brown. Remove from the heat and set aside.
4. In a large salad bowl, prepare the dressing by whisking together the oil, vinegar, garlic, salt, pepper, mustard, and maple syrup. Add the arugula or salad greens and toss to coat.

5. Divide the salad onto four chilled plates. Arrange the roasted pears in a fan around the center, and sprinkle with the cranberries, Parmesan cheese, and pine nuts. Scatter with petals from the calendula blossoms.

arugula-fennel-and-apricot-salad.name: Arugula, Fennel, And Apricot Salad

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced, plus 1 tablespoon chopped fronds

instructions: Whisk vinegar and shallot in medium bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Season dressing to taste with salt and pepper.

Place arugula, sliced fennel, and apricots in large bowl. Whisk chopped fennel fronds into dressing. Drizzle dressing over salad and toss to coat evenly. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Transfer salad to large serving bowl. Sprinkle pistachios over and serve.

asian-chicken-sesame-salad.name: Asian Chicken Sesame Salad
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the vinegar, oil, soy sauce, tahini, brown sugar, and salt.
Add the lettuce, cabbage, green onions, almonds, chicken, and the seeds and stir into the sauce until the sauce covers all the ingredients.
Serve.

autumn-apple-slab-pie.name: Autumn Apple Slab Pie
instructions: Combine flour, butter, and salt in a food processor. Pulse until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Stir water and vinegar together in a bowl.
Pour 1/2 the water mixture into the flour mixture in the food processor. Pulse to combine. Pour in remaining water mixture and pulse until dough just starts to come together but is still crumbly.
Turn dough out onto a wooden surface. Pat into a round shape and cut into 3 equal pieces. Form each into a disc about 5 inches wide, wrap each in plastic wrap, and refrigerate until ready to use.

Toss apples and lemon juice together in a bowl. Sprinkle flour over apples and toss to coat. Gently mix in brown sugar, cinnamon, vanilla extract, salt, cloves, nutmeg, and allspice until apples are thoroughly coated. Fold in raisins and walnuts.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Flour a work surface and roll out 2 of the 3 dough pieces into a rectangle about 12x18 inches in size and about 1/4-inch thick. Gently place crust into a 10x15-inch jelly roll pan and press dough into corners. Trim excess dough so there is only 1 inch of overhang on all sides. Gently fold overhanging dough underneath itself and crimp along all edges of the pan. Use a fork to poke indentations sporadically in the bottom of the crust to prevent bubbling.
Pour filling into the crust and spread out evenly.
Roll out remaining dough piece on a floured surface to 1/4-inch thickness. Use decorative cookie cutters to cut out several pieces of pie dough and place cut-outs on top of filling in a pattern.
Beat egg and water together in a bowl. Gently brush egg wash over the edges of the pie crust and on the pie crust cut-outs.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is golden brown and apples are soft when gently pierced with a knife, 55 to 65 minutes. Allow to cool completely before cutting and serving, about 30 minutes.

avocado-and-cherry-tomato-salad-with-moz.name: Avocado And Cherry Tomato Salad With Mozzarella
avocado-and-cherry-tomato-salad-with-moz.original_name: Ensalada de aguacate y tomate cherry con mozzarella

ingredients.item: 200 g de tomates cherry (aprox. 1 taza y media)
125 g fresh mozzarella balls (1 big ball also serves)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
(optional) a few drops of balsamic vinegar or lemon

instructions: Lavamos bien los tomates cherry y los cortamos por la mitad. Si son muy grandes, en cuartos.
We peel the avocado, remove the bone and cut it into middlees. We added it to the bowl.
Incorporamos las bolitas de mozzarella enteras (o troceamos si usamos una grande)
We put the basil into thin strips and put it up.
We scold with extra virgin olive oil, get out to taste and, if we like, a touch of balsamic vinegar or lemon. We blend carefully so that the avocado doesn't get rid of and we serve at once.

avocado-couscous-with-smoked-salmon-lezz.name: Avocado Couscous With Smoked Salmon
instructions: 1. You can start if the materials are prepared for the recipe of boiled salmon avocadoted kuskus.
2. First of all, cook and drink in cold water.
3. blend with fine chopped fresh onions and delicacies.
4. Taste with a little lemon and olive oil and wait on aside.
5. In the meantime, plaster the fillet with very little olive oil, let you lighten the surface with salt, pepper and fresh thyme.
6.  The bottom of a large saucepan based on the bottom of the cherry tree chip sprinkle.
7. Put a grill that can fit into the pan on it (it can be microwave grills).
8. Place the cover, close the cover.
9. Water and also no fat.
10. Firstly incense between 15 to 20 minutes in medium fire (according to the size of theFileton).
11. 11. Service plate broadcast kuskusu.
12. In a bowl, mix with avocado slices, olive oil, salt, pepper, slightly lemon juice and get to the service plate.
12. August Put incense salmon meat on it and serve.

15. I'm remembered when writing the article right now! Remember that it will give you a very nice sourness.
16. I'm using a smoke pot that I bought from abroad to incense the fish.
17. September Very simple mechanism.
18. A fine-based pot also sees the same job.
19. September Only from the base you will need a wire grid that will keep the fish at the height of two fingers.

avocado-with-tahini-lezzet.name: Avocado With Tahini
instructions: 1. Peel the bark of avocado with vegetable peel and remove the kernel.
2. Pour tahini with delicate sour on it.
3. Then sprinkle the lor cheese, peek seeds with walnuts.
4. Serve without waiting.
